title: teucrium dunense subsp. dunense
intro: Teucrium dunense subsp. dunense, also known as Eastern Balkan germander, is a plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae, native to the Balkan Peninsula. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Teucrium dunense subsp. dunense include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and acting as an antiviral agent. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, or used in herbal supplements to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
